name: dali-ui-preview-cli
description: CLI that renders Tizen DALi UI C++ to a PNG and emits a JSON node tree for humans and AI agents.

scripts.//: DO NOT add a top-level 'build' script. npm treats a git-installed package that has scripts.build as a build-from-source checkout and, under the default install-links=false, links the transient git clone into the global node_modules instead of packing it — leaving a dangling symlink so `npm i -g github:dalihub/dali-ui-preview-cli` silently produces a broken CLI (command not found). We ship a prebuilt out/ and compile via 'compile' instead.
scripts.test:e2e:local: npm run compile && bash tests/e2e/render-modes.sh local
scripts.test:e2e:docker: npm run compile && bash tests/e2e/render-modes.sh docker
